assertions.title: ReportPage displays video players per scenario-persona

steps.observed: ReportPage loaded showing Trust Audit Report with trust score 100/100, 0 findings, 2 scenarios, 2 personas

steps.action: Scroll down past Screenshot Timeline to find Session Recordings section
steps.expected: Session Recordings heading visible after Screenshot Timeline
steps.observed: H2 'Session Recordings' heading found positioned after H2 'Screenshot Timeline', with subtitle 'Browser session recordings captured during the audit journey.'

steps.action: Check all video elements have controls attribute
Check video element readyState and error status
steps.expected: Videos loaded successfully with no errors
Each video has a valid WebM source URL
steps.observed: 4 <source> elements with type='video/webm' pointing to /artifacts/videos/08d0b4d2-.../cookie_consent_privacy_sensitive.webm, cookie_consent_cost_sensitive.webm, checkout_flow_privacy_sensitive.webm, checkout_flow_cost_sensitive.webm

steps.action: Verify video containers have scenario and persona labels
steps.expected: Each video card shows scenario name and persona name
steps.observed: 4 labeled containers: (1) Cookie Consent / Privacy Sensitive, (2) Cookie Consent / Cost Sensitive, (3) Checkout Flow / Privacy Sensitive, (4) Checkout Flow / Cost Sensitive

steps.action: Verify videos are NOT replaced by 'Video unavailable' error messages
steps.observed: Zero elements matching [class*=error] or [class*=unavailable] containing 'video' or 'unavailable' text. Videos render with playback controls (play, volume, fullscreen, time 0:00/0:01)

steps.action: Check browser console for media errors
steps.observed: No media errors. 4 React dev warnings about empty src attributes (from Screenshot Timeline section img elements, not video elements). Standard React Router future flag warnings. No video decode or playback errors.

evidence.consoleErrors: 4 React dev warnings about empty src attributes (screenshot section, not videos). No media/video errors.

domInspection.sessionRecordingsHeading: H2, positioned after Screenshot Timeline H2

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-VIDEO-003 PASSES — ReportPage displays 4 HTML5 <video> elements with controls attribute, each inside a labeled container showing scenario and persona names. The 'Session Recordings' H2 heading appears after Screenshot Timeline. All videos loaded successfully (readyState=4) with the 185-byte known-good WebM files from mathiasbynens/small. No 'Video unavailable' error states. No media-related console errors.
